Skill Description: Deal 300/300/300% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target and adjacent enemies, then Wound them for 5/5/5 seconds. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%.
Passive: Reduce each instance of incoming damage by 12/15/25% Ability Power.
Gain 10% of Garen's max Health as bonus max Health. Garen's next attack deals 180% Attack Damage plus 10% of Garen's max Health as physical damage.
Throw a blade at the current target that bounces 3/3/3 times, dealing 140/210/315% Ability Power magic damage and applying Wound for 6/6/6 seconds. Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%.
For the next 6 seconds, gain a 250% Attack Damage plus 100/120/140% Ability Power Shield and attacks deal 85% Attack Damage bonus physical damage to her target and enemies within 1 hex of the target.

Passive: Attacks that critically strike grant a stack of Style, up to 6 stacks. Each stack grants 20% Ability Power Attack Speed. Active: Deal 240/240/250% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target, then another 110% Attack Damage physical damage per Style stack. Afterwards, reset Style.

For 8 seconds, convert bonus Attack Speed to Attack Damage. Attacks deal 175/175/180% Attack Damage plus 15/25/40% Ability Power physical damage in a cone and grant Urgot 20% of the damage dealt as a 5 second Shield. If Urgot only hits one target, deal 50% bonus damage.
Fire shots at the 4 furthest enemies. Shots deal 360/360/750% Attack Damage plus 40/60/200% Ability Power physical damage to the first enemy they hit.
Stun the largest group of nearby enemies for 1.75/2/8 seconds and deal 150/225/1200% Ability Power magic damage to each. Thresh heals for 250/300/600 + 50/50/50% of the total damage dealt.
Deal 300/450/675% Ability Power magic damage to the current target and Stun them for 1.25/1.25/1.25 seconds.
Gain a 240/290/330 plus 6% of Taric's max Health Shield for 4 seconds. Taric's next 2 attacks deal 250/375/565% Ability Power bonus magic damage.
Heal 500/575/650 Health over 2/2/2 seconds. Then, deal 190/285/440% Ability Power magic damage to adjacent enemies and Chill them for 3/3/3 seconds. Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 30%.

Leap at the highest Health enemy within 2/2/2 hexes and deal 230/345/520% Ability Power magic damage to them. Then, deal 140/210/315% Ability Power magic damage to all adjacent enemies. Gain 10/10/10% Attack Damage and Ability Power for the rest of combat.
Fire a beam at the farthest enemy, dealing 250/375/550% Ability Power magic damage to all enemies it hits.

Passive: Deal 100/150/1000% Ability Power magic damage to a nearby enemy every 2/2/2 seconds. Active: Gain a 600/750/2000% Ability Power Shield. For 5/5/5 seconds, Blitzcrank's Passive deals damage every second and deals an additional 1/1/1% of the target's max Health as magic damage.
Throw 21 cards (scales with Attack Speed) divided between the current target and 3 nearest enemies. They reduce Magic Resist by 1 and deal 50/75/225% Ability Power magic damage.
Bounce 3/3/3 times on nearby enemies. Each bounce deals 120/180/1200% Ability Power magic damage, Stuns for 1/1/1 second, and heals Zac for 120/160/800% Ability Power Health.

Mark the current target and spawn an untargetable Shadow with 185/185/370% Attack Damage for 4/4/4 seconds. After a brief delay or when the marked enemy falls below 15% health, deal an additional 350/350/700% Attack Damage physical damage.
